The phrase "(1 / 3) %" means one-third of one percent, which is (1/3)/100 = 1/300.  
Multiplying 1,109 by 1/300 gives 1,109 ÷ 300 = 3.69666..., which rounds to 3.697.  
The closest option is 3.6597, but the exact calculation yields 3.6967, so the best match among the choices is D.

\boxed{D}
